service.name: Salesforce REST API
service.description_for_ai: Enterprise CRM platform. Leads, opportunities, accounts, contacts, cases. Workflow automation, reporting. Most widely used CRM in enterprise. Use for sales pipeline, customer data, service management.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Query Salesforce objects using SOQL. Get leads, opportunities, accounts, contacts with custom filters.

q.description: SOQL query e.g. SELECT Id,Name,Amount,StageName FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName=Prospecting

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new Salesforce record: Lead, Contact, Account, Opportunity, Case.
